root_cause: Scheduling constraints oscillated across retries instead of converging on a stable blocker
evidence: FailedScheduling categories alternated as: affinity -> topology -> affinity -> topology
Multiple distinct scheduling constraint families were observed
Dominant scheduler message: 0/4 nodes are available: 4 node(s) didn't match Pod's node selector.

causes.message: Scheduler emitted alternating FailedScheduling categories: affinity -> topology -> affinity -> topology
Different scheduling constraint families alternated across retries without converging
Placement feasibility shifted between competing constraint classes instead of converging
Pod remains Pending while scheduler encounters changing constraint failures

pod:constraint-oscillation-pod: Scheduler alternated between different scheduling constraint families over time

likely_causes: Different schedulability constraints are surfacing as cluster state changes between retries
Capacity and placement policy are both contributing to an unstable scheduling outcome
The pod is affected by multiple competing scheduling blockers rather than one stable cause
suggested_checks: Inspect affinity, topology, taints, and resource requests together
